urls.title: Page URLs
urls.description: One or more URLs to capture. Each URL gets a separate screenshot and diagnostics report.

viewportHeight.title: Viewport Height (px)
viewportHeight.description: Browser viewport height in pixels. Ignored when fullPage is true.

fullPage.title: Full Page Screenshot
fullPage.description: If true, captures the entire scrollable page. If false, captures only the viewport.

deviceEmulation.title: Device Emulation
deviceEmulation.description: Emulate a specific device. Overrides viewport settings. 'none' uses the viewport settings above.

format.title: Image Format
format.description: Output image format. PNG is lossless, JPEG is smaller, WebP offers the best compression.

quality.title: JPEG/WebP Quality
quality.description: Image quality for JPEG and WebP formats (1-100). Ignored for PNG.

darkMode.title: Dark Mode
darkMode.description: If true, forces prefers-color-scheme: dark via CSS media query emulation.

waitUntil.title: Page Load Strategy
waitUntil.description: When to consider the page loaded. 'networkidle' waits for no network activity for 500ms. Use 'load' for faster captures.

waitAfter.title: Extra Wait (ms)
waitAfter.description: Additional milliseconds to wait after page load before capturing. Useful for pages with animations or lazy-loaded content.

blockImages.title: Block Images
blockImages.description: If true, blocks image loading for faster captures. Screenshot will show placeholder icons for images.
